title: dendrobium roylei
intro: Dendrobium roylei, also known as the Royle's dendrobium, is a type of orchid native to the Himalayan region. This epiphytic orchid has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dendrobium roylei include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, tinctures, or extracts, which are believed to provide various health benefits when consumed responsibly under medical guidance.
